name: Lisa
comment:
# Lisa

    A simple lisp
    Example:
    ```
    (def fib (n)
        (if (<= n 2) 1
            (-
                (fib (- n 1))
                (fib (- n 2)))))
    (var fib10 (fib 10))
    ```

    @docs processString
    @docs processStringToJson

values.name: processString
values.comment: Parse a string into a program

values.name: processStringToJson
values.comment: Parse a string into a Json representation of a program
